---
title: "Other"
---

I love art and subjects that hold emotional and sentimental values. For that, outside of data analytics and class projects, I enjoy exploring creative projects that involve apparels, visual communication, and storytelling. 

These interests help me think about how ideas are presented, not just what the ideas are.

## Pomme
These are some of my products from the first program of my pop-up clothing brand, **Pomme**, which opened between 2020–2021 as my first startup.

::: {.pomme-gallery}
![](images/pomme1.JPG){fig-alt="Pomme clothing product photo 1"}

![](images/pomme 2.JPG){fig-alt="Pomme clothing product photo 2"}

![](images/pomme 3.JPG){fig-alt="Pomme clothing product photo 3"}
:::


## Photography
I enjoy painting, but I can't paint nor draw. So I use my camera as the tool for me to create real life painting - photographs.
